testPush.title: Duba sanarwa da farko
testPush.subtitle: Aiko wa kanka samfurin sanarwa cikin {{language}}
testPush.sentBody: Duba sanarwarka don ganin yadda gargadin masu kallo zai bayyana cikin harshenka.
testPush.noDeviceTitle: Babu na'urar da aka yi rajista
testPush.noDeviceBody: Ba mu sami na'ura don asusunka ba. Buɗe app a kan na'urar da kake son karɓar sanarwa, sannan ka sake gwadawa. Ga yadda sanarwar za ta kasance:
testPush.rateLimitedBody: Don Allah ka jira kusan {{seconds}} sakanni kafin ka sake aikawa wani sanarwar gwaji.
testPush.failedBody: Wani abu ya yi kuskure yayin aika sanarwar gwajinka. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.
